title: Cook's Collection
description: A collection of rustic homestyle additions to the Farmer's Delight mod.
body:
**Cook's Collection** is an addon mod for Farmer's Delight that adds some rustic homestyle additions to your recipe book.

Building off of Farmer's Delights cooking systems, and with a few new ingredients such as salt and lemons, you'll be able to prepare a small variety of **homestyle goods**: from baking bread and muffins, to frying all sorts of crispy goods.

It's time to expand your kitchen!

 

**Getting Started:**

Many of the new foods introduced in this mod are made in an **Oven**, a brick chamber that is placed on top of a heat source. Other new foods are made in the Cooking Pot using a new resource, **Cooking Oil**, made from Sunflowers.


If you have any problems, suggestions, or want to be included, join [the discord!](https://discord.gg/8k53Kkqcdv)
